name: Renat Elubaev
title: Artist, Member of the Union of Artists of the Republic of Kazakhstan
achievements: Grand Prix Laureate, International Art Olympiad, Belarus
Gold Medal Recipient, International Art Exhibition, United States
Record Holder, KINES Register of Kazakhstan

name: Meiirzhan Suanbekov
title: Cinematographer, Videographer and Color Grading Specialist
achievements: Member of the League of Cinematographers of Kazakhstan
Member of the Youth Association of the Union of Artists of Astana
Member of the Guild of Theatre, Cinema and Television, Eurasian Art Union
bio: His work has been exhibited at galleries in Bristol (United Kingdom) and Astana (Kazakhstan) and documented by national media outlets in both countries. He was invited to the jury on the basis of his professional expertise in cinematography, videography, digital visual aesthetics, and his authorial color grading methodology.

name: Yerlan Nazarkulov
title: Artist and Sculptor, Member of the Union of Artists of the Republic of Kazakhstan
achievements: Member of the World Art Academy (Mondial Art Academia), Paris, France
Corresponding Member of the Academy of Arts of the Republic of Kazakhstan
International professional artist — PIPA and IAPA
Artist of the Month — Mondial Art Academia, December 2024
